ddls:
CREATE TABLE "api_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API request */,
  "account_no" TEXT /* Account number of the user making the request */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the user's session */,
  "encrypted_pin" TEXT /* Encrypted PIN provided by the user */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the user's device */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference of the user (default: 1 for English) */,
  "wd_process_nos" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of process numbers in the request */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the request was made */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was sent */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the API request (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* Body of the API request */,
  "response_body" TEXT /* Body of the API response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_account_no FOREIGN KEY ("account_no") REFERENCES users ("account_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_os_version FOREIGN KEY ("os_version") REFERENCES operating_systems ("version"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "account_no" TEXT /* Account number of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "security_question" TEXT /* Security question for the user */,
  "security_answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session ended */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "token" TEXT /* Session token */,
  "refresh_token" TEXT /* Refresh token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the process was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the process was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API request associated with the log */,
  "request_data" TEXT /* Data of the API request */,
  "response_data" TEXT /* Data of the API response */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_logs_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES api_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API request associated with the statistics */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the statistics */,
  "process_id" TEXT /* ID of the process associated with the statistics */,
  "request_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the request was made */,
  "response_time_ms" INTEGER /* Response time in milliseconds */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date of the statistics entry */,
  "average_response_time" INTEGER /* Average response time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_stats_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_stats_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES api_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_stats_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security event */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API request associated with the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the security event (e.g., failed login, suspicious activity) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the security event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES api_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_processes" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API request */,
  "process_id" TEXT /* ID of the process */,
  "sequence_no" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the process in the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id", "process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_info" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., mobile, tablet) */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the device was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_info_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geolocation" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API request associated with the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "location_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the location was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geolocation_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES api_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column affected */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "audit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
